			.pseudo-preloader .global-container { z-index: 100; position: relative; }
			.pseudo-preloader .global-wrapper:before {
				position: absolute; content: ""; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%;
				position: fixed; height: 100vh;
				-webkit-transition: all 0.3s;
				-webkit-transition-delay: 0.2s;
				-moz-transition: all 0.3s 0.2s;
				-o-transition: all 0.3s 0.2s;
				transition: all 0.3s 0.2s;
				z-index: 999999; background: #fff; }

			.pseudo-preloader .global-wrapper:after {
				width: 80px;
				height: 80px;
				content: "";		background: transparent url("https://gmedia.do/wp-content/themes/seowp/images/preloader.gif") no-repeat;		background-size: 80px 80px;
				position: fixed; display: block; left: 50%; top: 50vh; margin-left: -40px; z-index: 1000000;

				-webkit-transition: all 0.4s;
				-webkit-transition-delay: 0.4s;

				-moz-transition: all 0.4s 0.4s;
				-o-transition: all 0.4s 0.4s;
				transition: all 0.4s 0.4s;
			}

			html.content-loaded .global-wrapper:before,
			html.content-loaded .global-wrapper:after {
				opacity: 0; z-index: -1; color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);
				-webkit-transition: all 0.2s;
				-moz-transition: all 0.2s;
				-o-transition: all 0.2s;
				transition: all 0.2s; }

		<style type="text/css" id="wp-custom-css">
			/* MEGA MAIN MENU */
 #dslc-module-4c31cb0b0e4 .dslc-module-shortcode li, #dslc-module-cb1c01d2f96 .dslc-module-shortcode li, ul#main_ul-header-menu {
	margin-bottom: 0 !important;
}

.mega_main_menu.header-menu .mega_dropdown > li.current-menu-item > .item_link * {
	color: rgba(95,115,198,1) !important;
}

/* #menu-item-1468 ul.mega_dropdown {
    width: 550px;
    position: absolute;
    height: 200px;
} */

div#header-menu {
    z-index: 0 !important;
}

#menu-item-1445 ul.mega_dropdown {
    width: 1300px;
}

#menu-item-1462 ul.mega_dropdown {
    width: 100%;
}

#main_ul-header-menu a::before {
    display: none;
}


/*J*/
.mega_main_menu li.default_dropdown > .mega_dropdown > li {
    display: flex !important;
    align-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.mobile_button .symbol_menu{
	font-size: 50px !important;
	font-weight: 800;
	color: #AA52A1;
}

.mobile_button .symbol_cross {
	font-size: 18px;
	font-weight: 600;
	color: #AA52A1;
}

#main_ul-header-menu {
    background: none !important;
}

.mega_main_menu.header-menu .mega_dropdown li:before {
color: #fff;
}

.mega_main_menu.header-menu .mega_dropdown>li>.item_link:hover * {
    color: rgb(255 255 255) !important;
    transform: scale(1.015);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.mega_main_menu.header-menu .multicolumn_dropdown > .mega_dropdown > li.default_dropdown .mega_dropdown > li > .item_link:focus {
    background: none;
}

@media(min-width: 958px) and (max-width: 1440px) {
	li#menu-item-1445 > ul.mega_dropdown {
    left: -200px;
	} 	
}

@media(min-width: 1440px) {
	li#menu-item-1445 > ul.mega_dropdown {
    position: fixed;
		left: 80px;
	} 	
} 

@media(min-width: 1600px) {
	li#menu-item-1445 > ul.mega_dropdown {
	left: 200px;	
	}
}


@media(min-width: 2000px) {
	li#menu-item-1445 > ul.mega_dropdown {
/*     position: absolute; */
/* 		left: -200px; */
	} 
} 


/*Estilos especiales para la página*/

a.customize-unpreviewable {
	cursor: pointer !important;
}

/*Hide line*/

.dslc-modules-section:has(#dslc-module-2079){
	margin-top:-40px;
	background-color:white;
}

/*Left column */
.dslc-col:has(
.styleGleftmargin){
	padding-right:25px;
}

/*Left column */
.dslc-col:has(
.styleGrightmargin){
	padding-right:25px;
}



/*Hide columns*/
.styleGhidden{
	display:none;
}
.dslc-icon-plus:before, .dslc-icon-minus:before{
	display:none;
}

.dslc-active .dslc-accordion-header{
	border-color:#6373b6 !important;
}

/*Center Columns*/

.styleGstretch.dslc-modules-section  {
	box-shadow: inset 0 -15px 15px -15px rgba(0,0,0,0.2) !important;
/* 	padding-bottom: 50px !important; */
}

.styleGstretch .dslc-modules-section-wrapper{
	display:flex;
	flex-wrap:wrap;
	align-items:stretch;	
}

.styleGstretch .dslc-modules-section-wrapper .dslc-modules-area:has(#dslc-module-76f7f77bf01,#dslc-module-3968c5ba0b3, #dslc-module-953f169fcc9, #dslc-module-de11a89266d, #dslc-module-c2b424cbe13, #dslc-module-44532941319, #dslc-module-95ea0898999, #dslc-module-173666028bf, #dslc-module-ee169f7dd90, #dslc-module-fd9b524b7ad, #dslc-module-785a9034d21, #dslc-module-3a3eacc8627, #dslc-module-27c02ef4157, #dslc-module-668c710e0b8, #dslc-module-c156ec17b4c, #dslc-module-4df4b046e8d, #dslc-module-0835be0d0a4, #dslc-module-4df4b046e8d, #dslc-module-b35487104cd, #dslc-module-1473d0b86cb, #dslc-module-f80e44a7cfd, #dslc-module-2ee77cb37e1, #dslc-module-1229154eb7f, #dslc-module-70017503d11, #dslc-module-9c32cfccbde){
	display:flex;
	flex-wrap:wrap;
	align-content:center;
}


/*Title adjustiment*/


/* h1{
	font-size:36px !important;
	font-weight:500 !important;
	margin-bottom:20px !important;
	line-height:45px !important;
} */


p{
	font-size:16px !important;
	line-height:20px !important;
}

.dslc-text-module-content p{
	text-align:justify;
}

/* .dslc-text-module-content h2{
	font-size:28px !important;
} */

h3{
	margin-bottom:8px !important;
	color:#6373B6;
	line-height: 36px !important;
}

.styleGbottomfooter p{
	font-size:12px !important;
}


/*Videos*/
/*
.ms-slide-bgvideocont:after{
	content:'';
	width:100%;
	height:1500px;
	background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
	position:absolute;
}
*/

.ms-slide .ms-slide-bgvideocont {
	height: 98%;
}



.styleGvideo{
	width:90%;
	height:215px;
}

/*Logo header*/
.dslc-sticky-section-fixed .dslc-logo img{
	padding:5px;
	max-width:130px !important;
	transition:0.5s ease-in-out;
}
.dslc-sticky-row .dslc-logo img{

	transition:0.5s ease-in-out;
}


/*Buttons*/

.styleGbuttonheader a{
  background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 20%, #2483C6 100%);
	transition:1s ease-out;
	cursor:pointer;
	background-size:150%;
	border-radius:50px !important;
	color:white !important;
	border:none;
}

.styleGbuttonheader a:hover{
	 background-position: right center;
	transition:1s ease-in;
}


.styleGbuttom a, a.styleGbuttom, #dslc-module-5726943ceda input[type=submit], #dslc-module-927f6fcad50 input[type=submit], #dslc-module-dmq4ovo74n8 .dslc-info-box-button a, .styleGservice .dslc-info-box-button a, #blog .blog-posts .dslc-blog-post-read-more a, #blog .blog-posts .dslc-cpt-post-read-more a,#blog button.wp-block-search__button.wp-element-button, #singleBlogPost button.wp-block-search__button.wp-element-button, #dslc-module-5355 .dslc-button a, #dslc-module-f4a7be97320 .dslc-button a, #empleo button, #nf-field-16, #fuentesExternas .return-btn a, #solicitar-cotizacion button {
  background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 20%, #2483C6 100%) !important;
	transition:1s ease-out;
	cursor:pointer;
	background-size:150%;
	border-radius:50px !important;
	color:white !important;
	padding:10px 25px !important;
	font-size:14px !important;
}

#footer .social-icons a {
	background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 -3%, #2483C6 100%) !important;
	transition:1s ease-out;
	cursor:pointer;
	background-size:150%;
	border-radius:50% !important;
	color:white !important;
	font-size:14px !important;
}

.styleGbuttom a:hover, #dslc-module-5726943ceda input[type=submit]:hover, .dslc-cpt-post-read-more a:hover, #dslc-module-927f6fcad50 input[type=submit]:hover, .styleGservice .dslc-info-box-button a:hover, .styleGform input[type=submit]:hover{
	 background-position: right center;
	transition:1s ease-in;
	
}

/*Verticaly center a column */
.styleGsection .dslc-modules-section-wrapper{
	
display:flex;
 flex-wrap:wrap;
 align-items: center;
	
}

/*2 sections dived*/

.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper{
	display:flex;
  align-items:stretch;
}

.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper .dslc-modules-area:nth-child(1){
	background: linear-gradient(-75deg, rgba(36,131,198,1) 0%, rgba(36,131,198,0.5) 100%), url('https://gmedia.do/wp-content/uploads/PorqueElegirnos.png');
	background-size:cover;
	display:flex;
	justify-content: flex-end;
	padding-right:40px;
}

.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper .dslc-modules-area:nth-child(2){
	background: linear-gradient(75deg, rgba(170,82,161,1) 0%, rgba(170,82,161, 0.5) 100%), url('https://gmedia.do/wp-content/uploads/Sectores.png');
	background-size:cover;
	display:flex;
	justify-content: flex-start;
  align-content: flex-end;
	padding-left:40px;
	
}

.styleGdivided .dslc-first-col{
	margin-right:0px !important;
	
}


.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper :is(#dslc-module-fsk5a56dsoo, #dslc-module-qs8cqrchu7){
	max-width:600px;
}

.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper :is(#dslc-module-9asfadn3mao, #dslc-module-9if3bstt4j8, #dslc-module-e6d66a9aa1b){
	max-width:600px;
}



.styleGdivided .dslc-modules-section-wrapper .dslc-modules-area :is(h2, h3, h4, p) {
 color:#fff;
}
 
.styleGbottomfooter{
	background:transparent !important;
	background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 20%, #2483C6 100%) !important;
	background-size:150% !important;
	color:white !important;
}

/*-------*/


/*Header*/


.styleGtopbar{
	background:transparent !important;
	background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 20%, #2483C6 100%) !important;
	background-size:150% !important;
	color:white !important;
}

.header-shade{
	box-shadow: 0 5px 5px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
}

.menu > li:not(.menu-type-columns) li:not(.lcmenu-additional-info){
	transition:1s;
}

.menu > li:not(.menu-type-columns) li:not(.lcmenu-additional-info):hover{
  background-image: linear-gradient(-45deg, #AA52A1 20%, #2483C6 100%) !important;
	background-size:150% !important;
	transition:1s ease-out;
	cursor:pointer;
	background-size:150%;
	color:white !important;
}

/*Service order*/
#menu-item-1445 .sub-menu{
	flex-wrap:wrap !important;
	width:1200px;
	
}
#menu-item-1445 .sub-menu  :is(#menu-item-1447, #menu-item-1446, #menu-item-1462, #menu-item-61428, #menu-item-61429, #menu-item-61430){
	width:30% !important;
	min-width:25%;
	
}

/*Pilares solitarios*/
#menu-item-61441 a, #menu-item-1474 a {
	font-size:16px !important;
	font-weight:500 !important;
	text-transform:uppercase;
	color:#2483c6 !important;
}

#menu-item-61441 .menu-item-description, #menu-item-61442 .menu-item-description {
	font-size:12px !important;
}

#menu-item-61441, #menu-item-1474{
	flex-wrap:nowrap;
}

/*---*/
#dslc-header .sub-menu .menu-item-has-children{
	margin-bottom:20px;
}


/*Footer*/

#dslc-content .dslc-navigation {
	z-index: 0;
}
.styleGcarousel img{
	filter: invert(0%);
	transition:.8s;
}

.styleGcarousel img:hover{
	filter: invert(40%);
	transition:.8s;
}

.styleGfooter h3{
	color:#2483c6;
	
}

#dslc-module-5726943ceda .field-wrap{
	padding:0px !important;

@keyframes pulse {
	0% {
		transform: scale(0.8);

	}

	70% {
		transform: scale(1);
		box-shadow: 0 0 0 20px rgba(161, 102, 255, 0);

	100% {

		box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(161, 102, 255, 0);
	}
}

								<div class="dslc-accordion-header dslc-accordion-hook">
									<span class="dslc-accordion-title">¿Qué incluye el servicio de diseño web en República Dominicana?         </span>
																												<div class="dslca-accordion-action-hooks">
											<span class="dslca-toggle-accordion-hook"><span class="dslca-icon dslc-icon-plus"></span></span>
										</div>
																	</div>

								<div class="dslc-accordion-content" style="display: none;">
									<div class="dslca-editable-content">
										El desarrollo web en República Dominicana abarca la creación de sitios web personalizados, diseño responsivo, optimización SEO, integración de funciones específicas y soporte técnico continuo. 									</div>
																	</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-content -->

							</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-item -->

						
							<div class="dslc-accordion-item dslc-inactive" id="accordion-1">

								<div class="dslc-accordion-header dslc-accordion-hook">
									<span class="dslc-accordion-title">        ¿Por qué es importante contar con un sitio web bien desarrollado?              </span>
																												<div class="dslca-accordion-action-hooks">
											<span class="dslca-toggle-accordion-hook"><span class="dslca-icon dslc-icon-plus"></span></span>
										</div>
																	</div>

								<div class="dslc-accordion-content" style="display: none;">
									<div class="dslca-editable-content">
										 Un sitio web bien desarrollado en República Dominicana es crucial para establecer una presencia en línea efectiva, atraer y retener clientes locales y potenciales, y competir en el mercado digital. 									</div>
																	</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-content -->

							</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-item -->

						
							<div class="dslc-accordion-item dslc-inactive" id="accordion-2">

								<div class="dslc-accordion-header dslc-accordion-hook">
									<span class="dslc-accordion-title">        ¿Qué factores debo considerar al elegir un servicio de diseño web en República Dominicana?        </span>
																												<div class="dslca-accordion-action-hooks">
											<span class="dslca-toggle-accordion-hook"><span class="dslca-icon dslc-icon-plus"></span></span>
										</div>
																	</div>

								<div class="dslc-accordion-content" style="display: none;">
									<div class="dslca-editable-content">

																	</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-content -->

							</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-item -->

						
							<div class="dslc-accordion-item dslc-inactive" id="accordion-3">

								<div class="dslc-accordion-header dslc-accordion-hook">
									<span class="dslc-accordion-title">              ¿Cuánto tiempo toma la creación de un sitio web en República Dominicana?        </span>
																												<div class="dslca-accordion-action-hooks">
											<span class="dslca-toggle-accordion-hook"><span class="dslca-icon dslc-icon-plus"></span></span>
										</div>
																	</div>

								<div class="dslc-accordion-content" style="display: none;">
									<div class="dslca-editable-content">
										 El tiempo de la creación de una pagina web en República Dominicana varía según la complejidad del proyecto. Sitios simples pueden estar listos en semanas, mientras que proyectos más complejos pueden llevar varios meses. 									</div>
																	</div><!-- .dslc-accordion-content -->

							<div class="dslc-accordion-item dslc-inactive" id="accordion-4">

									<span class="dslc-accordion-title">          ¿Qué factores influyen en los costos de la creación de una web en República Dominicana?</span>
																												<div class="dslca-accordion-action-hooks">
											<span class="dslca-toggle-accordion-hook"><span class="dslca-icon dslc-icon-plus"></span></span>

																	</div>

								<div class="dslc-accordion-content" style="display: none;">
									<div class="dslca-editable-content">

También puede variar según la experiencia y reputación del proveedor de servicios.									</div>

<script>
(function () {
  function removeWelcomeH1(root=document) {
    root.querySelectorAll('h1').forEach(h1 => {
      if (h1.textContent && h1.textContent.trim().toLowerCase() === 'welcome!') {
        h1.remove();
      }
    });
  }

  // 1) intento inicial
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => removeWelcomeH1());

  // 2) observa inserciones dinámicas (cuando la app monta el modal)
  const obs = new MutationObserver(() => removeWelcomeH1());
  obs.observe(document.documentElement, { childList: true, subtree: true });
})();
</script>

<script type="text/javascript" src="https://gmedia.do/wp-content/plugins/ninja-forms/assets/js/min/front-end.js?ver=3.14.3" id="nf-front-end-js"></script>
<!-- Statistics script Complianz GDPR/CCPA -->
						<script id="tmpl-nf-layout" type="text/template">
	<span id="nf-form-title-{{{ data.id }}}" class="nf-form-title">
		{{{ ( 1 == data.settings.show_title ) ? '<h' + data.settings.form_title_heading_level + '>' + data.settings.title + '</h' + data.settings.form_title_heading_level + '>' : '' }}}
	</span>
	<div class="nf-form-wrap ninja-forms-form-wrap">
		<div class="nf-response-msg"></div>
		<div class="nf-debug-msg"></div>
		<div class="nf-before-form"></div>
		<div class="nf-form-layout"></div>
		<div class="nf-after-form"></div>
	</div>
</script>

<script id="tmpl-nf-empty" type="text/template">

</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-before-form" type="text/template">
	{{{ data.beforeForm }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-after-form" type="text/template">
	{{{ data.afterForm }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-before-fields" type="text/template">
    <div class="nf-form-fields-required">{{{ data.renderFieldsMarkedRequired() }}}</div>
    {{{ data.beforeFields }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-after-fields" type="text/template">
    {{{ data.afterFields }}}
    <div id="nf-form-errors-{{{ data.id }}}" class="nf-form-errors" role="alert"></div>
    <div class="nf-form-hp"></div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-before-field" type="text/template">
    {{{ data.beforeField }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-after-field" type="text/template">
    {{{ data.afterField }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-form-layout" type="text/template">
	<form>
		<div>
			<div class="nf-before-form-content"></div>
			<div class="nf-form-content {{{ data.element_class }}}"></div>
			<div class="nf-after-form-content"></div>
		</div>
	</form>
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-form-hp" type="text/template">
	<label id="nf-label-field-hp-{{{ data.id }}}" for="nf-field-hp-{{{ data.id }}}" aria-hidden="true">
		{{{ nfi18n.formHoneypot }}}
		<input id="nf-field-hp-{{{ data.id }}}" name="nf-field-hp" class="nf-element nf-field-hp" type="text" value="" aria-labelledby="nf-label-field-hp-{{{ data.id }}}" />
	</label>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-layout" type="text/template">
    <div id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}-container" class="nf-field-container {{{ data.type }}}-container {{{ data.renderContainerClass() }}}">
        <div class="nf-before-field"></div>
        <div class="nf-field"></div>
        <div class="nf-after-field"></div>
    </div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-before" type="text/template">
    {{{ data.beforeField }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-after" type="text/template">
    <#
    /*
     * Render our input limit section if that setting exists.
     */
    #>
    <div class="nf-input-limit"></div>
    <#
    /*
     * Render our error section if we have an error.
     */
    #>
    <div id="nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}" class="nf-error-wrap nf-error" role="alert" aria-live="assertive"></div>
    <#
    /*
     * Render any custom HTML after our field.
     */
    #>
    {{{ data.afterField }}}
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-wrap" type="text/template">
	<div id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}-wrap" class="{{{ data.renderWrapClass() }}}" data-field-id="{{{ data.id }}}">
		<#
		/*
		 * This is our main field template. It's called for every field type.
		 * Note that must have ONE top-level, wrapping element. i.e. a div/span/etc that wraps all of the template.
		 */
        #>
		<#
		/*
		 * Render our label.
		 */
        #>
		{{{ data.renderLabel() }}}
		<#
		/*
		 * Render our field element. Uses the template for the field being rendered.
		 */
        #>
		<div class="nf-field-element">{{{ data.renderElement() }}}</div>
		<#
		/*
		 * Render our Description Text.
		 */
        #>
		{{{ data.renderDescText() }}}
	</div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-wrap-no-label" type="text/template">
    <div id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}-wrap" class="{{{ data.renderWrapClass() }}}" data-field-id="{{{ data.id }}}">
        <div class="nf-field-label"></div>
        <div class="nf-field-element">{{{ data.renderElement() }}}</div>
        <div class="nf-error-wrap"></div>
    </div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-wrap-no-container" type="text/template">

        {{{ data.renderElement() }}}

        <div class="nf-error-wrap"></div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-label" type="text/template">
	<div class="nf-field-label">
		<# if ( data.type === "listcheckbox" || data.type === "listradio" || data.type === "listimage" || data.type === "date" || data.type === "starrating" || data.type === "signature" || data.type === "html" || data.type === "hr" ) { #>
			<span id="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
				class="nf-label-span {{{ data.renderLabelClasses() }}}">
					{{{ ( data.maybeFilterHTML() === 'true' ) ? _.escape( data.label ) : data.label }}} {{{ ( 'undefined' != typeof data.required && 1 == data.required ) ? '<span class="ninja-forms-req-symbol">*</span>' : '' }}} 
					{{{ data.maybeRenderHelp() }}}
			</span>
		<# } else { #>
			<label for="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
					id="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
					class="{{{ data.renderLabelClasses() }}}">
						{{{ ( data.maybeFilterHTML() === 'true' ) ? _.escape( data.label ) : data.label }}} {{{ ( 'undefined' != typeof data.required && 1 == data.required ) ? '<span class="ninja-forms-req-symbol">*</span>' : '' }}} 
						{{{ data.maybeRenderHelp() }}}
			</label>
		<# } #>
	</div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-error" type="text/template">
	<div class="nf-error-msg nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}" aria-live="assertive">{{{ data.msg }}}</div>
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-form-error" type="text/template">
	<div class="nf-error-msg nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}">{{{ data.msg }}}</div>
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-input-limit" type="text/template">
    {{{ data.currentCount() }}} {{{ nfi18n.of }}} {{{ data.input_limit }}} {{{ data.input_limit_msg }}}
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-null" type="text/template">
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-textbox" type="text/template">
	<input
		type="text"
		value="{{{ _.escape( data.value ) }}}"
		class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element"
		{{{ data.renderPlaceholder() }}}
		{{{ data.maybeDisabled() }}}
		{{{ data.maybeInputLimit() }}}
		id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
		name="{{ data.custom_name_attribute || 'nf-field-' + data.id + '-' + data.type }}"
		{{{ data.maybeDisableAutocomplete() }}}
		aria-invalid="false"
		aria-describedby="<# if( data.desc_text ) { #>nf-description-{{{ data.id }}} <# } #>nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}"
		aria-labelledby="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
		{{{ data.maybeRequired() }}}
	>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-input" type="text/template">
    <input id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" name="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" aria-invalid="false" aria-describedby="<# if( data.desc_text ) { #>nf-description-{{{ data.id }}} <# } #>nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}" class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element" type="text" value="{{{ _.escape( data.value ) }}}" {{{ data.renderPlaceholder() }}} {{{ data.maybeDisabled() }}}
           aria-labelledby="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"

            {{{ data.maybeRequired() }}}
    >
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-email" type="text/template">
	<input
		type="email"
		value="{{{ _.escape( data.value ) }}}"
		class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element"
		id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
		name="{{ data.custom_name_attribute || 'nf-field-' + data.id + '-' + data.type }}"
		{{{data.maybeDisableAutocomplete()}}}
		{{{ data.renderPlaceholder() }}}
		{{{ data.maybeDisabled() }}}
		aria-invalid="false"
		aria-describedby="<# if( data.desc_text ) { #>nf-description-{{{ data.id }}} <# } #>nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}"
		aria-labelledby="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"
		{{{ data.maybeRequired() }}}
	>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-textarea" type="text/template">
    <textarea id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" name="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" aria-invalid="false" aria-describedby="<# if( data.desc_text ) { #>nf-description-{{{ data.id }}} <# } #>nf-error-{{{ data.id }}}" class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element" {{{ data.renderPlaceholder() }}} {{{ data.maybeDisabled() }}} {{{ data.maybeDisableAutocomplete() }}} {{{ data.maybeInputLimit() }}}
        aria-labelledby="nf-label-field-{{{ data.id }}}"

        {{{ data.maybeRequired() }}}
    >{{{ _.escape( data.value ) }}}</textarea>
</script>

<!-- Rich Text Editor Templates -->

<script id="tmpl-nf-rte-media-button" type="text/template">
    <span class="dashicons dashicons-admin-media"></span>
</script>

<script id="tmpl-nf-rte-link-button" type="text/template">
    <span class="dashicons dashicons-admin-links"></span>
</script>

<script id="tmpl-nf-rte-unlink-button" type="text/template">
    <span class="dashicons dashicons-editor-unlink"></span>
</script>

<script id="tmpl-nf-rte-link-dropdown" type="text/template">
    <div class="rte-link">
        URL
        <input type="url" class="widefat code link-url"> <br />
        Text
        <input type="url" class="widefat code link-text"> <br />
        <label>
            <input type="checkbox" class="link-new-window"> {{{ nfi18n.fieldsTextareaOpenNewWindow }}}
        </label>
        <input type="button" class="cancel-link extra" value="Cancel">
        <input type="button" class="insert-link extra" value="Insert">
    </div>
</script>
<script id="tmpl-nf-field-recaptcha" type="text/template">
	<input id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" name="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element" type="hidden" value="{{{ data.value }}}" />

	<div class="g-recaptcha" data-callback="nf_recaptcha_response_{{{ data.id }}}" data-theme="{{{ data.theme }}}" data-sitekey="{{{ data.site_key }}}" data-fieldid="{{{ data.id }}}" {{{ ( "invisible" == data.size ) ? 'data-size="invisible"' : '' }}}></div>
</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-submit" type="text/template">

<# 
let myType = data.type
if('save'== data.type){
	myType = 'button'
}
#>
<input id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" class="{{{ data.renderClasses() }}} nf-element " type="{{{myType}}}" value="{{{ ( data.maybeFilterHTML() === 'true' ) ? _.escape( data.label ) : data.label }}}" {{{ ( data.disabled ) ? 'aria-disabled="true" disabled="true"' : '' }}}>

</script><script id="tmpl-nf-field-button" type="text/template">
    <button id="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" name="nf-field-{{{ data.id }}}" class="{{{ data.classes }}} nf-element">
        {{{ ( data.maybeFilterHTML() === 'true' ) ? _.escape( data.label ) : data.label }}}
    </button>
</script>
